member-signin.title: Member Sign In
member-signin.description: This is an integrated login for members. By signing in, you can access more information and services.

info_section.text_0: In accordance with Article 4 (Qualifications and Composition) of Chapter 2 of the Bylaws, membership eligibility is limited to current, temporary, and graduated students of Hanyang University. Therefore, we proceed with login/membership registration using Hanyang University email. If you have not created a Hanyang email yet,

help_section.title: Having trouble signing in?
help_section.text_4: Contact us via the KakaoTalk open channel
help_section.text_5: and we will assist you with logging into the service.

operator-signin.title: Operator Sign In
operator-signin.description: This is an integrated login for operators. After signing in, you will be redirected to the operator page.
